name: John Lennox
title: Mathematician & Apologist
bio: Northern Irish mathematician, bioethicist, and Christian apologist. Emeritus Professor of Mathematics at the University of Oxford. Known for debates with Richard Dawkins and Christopher Hitchens.
faith: Lennox is one of the most prominent Christian apologists in the academic world. He has debated leading atheists and written numerous books defending the Christian faith, including 'God's Undertaker: Has Science Buried God?' and 'Can Science Explain Everything?'
